text:
uname -a

FreeBSD nextcloud 13.1-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p9 n245431-b8ec9bde091 TRUENAS amd64


Steps to reproduce:

1. pkg install node
2. # node

Expected result:

Node should run

Actual result:

Node exists with an error

ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/bin/node: Undefined symbol "_ZNSt3__122__libcpp_verbose_abortEPKcz"
